changes: v11.32 / v3.101: has_dfa split + dfa_summary — has_dfa is now an independent boolean on recent_activities[], compact dfa_summary block in latest.json when quality is sufficient, quality gate tightened to require valid_pct ≥ 70% (fixes contamination from noisy sessions).

v3.102: Phase detection fixes — ctl_slope is now a linear regression over finalized weeks (no more spurious negatives), current-week hard-day scoring fixed, backfill no longer classifies the in-progress week.

v11.33 / v3.103: Athlete profile, notes, activity unit labels — new athlete_profile block (DOB/age/height/sex/location/timezone/tenure), athlete_notes passthrough, per-activity unit sibling fields (*_unit).

v11.34: Testing Protocol + RPE Expectation Bands — continuous-data-first testing guidance, explicit staleness signals and negative triggers, IF-calibrated RPE bands with duration/indoor/environmental modifiers. Docs-only.
Report templates — Weekly totals clarified as rolling 7d, Data Freshness rule added, HRRc display expanded to 4 cases, Polarization crosswalk row.
Docs — EXTERNAL_APIS.md switched to yr.no /complete + Open-Meteo added, intervals.json retention documented as 14d, SKILL.md completeness pass.
Upgrade: replace sync.py + pull fresh docs/templates.
